title: Integration tests: end-to-end fab_review actions + tool contracts + filesystem-edit fallback
description: End-to-end vitest integration tests for the fab_review MCP tool. Covers all 6 actions through the full service path (no internal mocking) using a tmpdir+git-init fixture. Extends tool-contracts.test.ts with fab_review schema snapshot. Adds filesystem-edit fallback integration test that manually moves a file from pending/ to canonical/ and asserts doctor synthesizes the promoted event.

files.change: Vitest suite: createV2Project tmpdir helper + git init + seed 5 pending entries (one per type); test cases for each action: list returns all 5; approve allocates 5 distinct stable_ids and git mvs to canonical paths; reject emits rejected events; modify in-place updates frontmatter; modify with layer flip allocates new id and changes layer; search with type filter returns matching subset; defer emits deferred event with until. Each test asserts the resulting events.jsonl trail.

Add fab_review entry to the contracts map: {name:'fab_review', inputSchema:FabReviewInputSchema, outputSchema:FabReviewOutputSchema, annotations:fabReviewAnnotations}. Run `pnpm test -u` once to baseline the snapshot. The test file should auto-generate the JSON snapshot via zodToJsonSchema and store under __tests__/__snapshots__/.

Vitest suite: createV2Project; manually copy a fixture .md file into .fabric/knowledge/team/decisions/KT-D-0099--manual-move.md (no fab_review approve, no events.jsonl event); call runDoctorReport; assert one fixable_error with code knowledge_promoted_synthesized_required and stable_id KT-D-0099. Call runDoctorFix; assert events.jsonl gains exactly one knowledge_promoted event with stable_id=KT-D-0099 and reason starting with '[synthesized]'.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/tools/mcp-server.test.ts to confirm createV2Project helper signature (mkdtemp prefix 'fabric-mcp-server-', mkdir .fabric/knowledge/{type}/, write agents.meta.json) and reuse pattern

Implement integration/fab-review.test.ts beforeEach: createV2Project tmpdir; execFileSync('git',['init'],{cwd:projectRoot}); execFileSync('git',['config','user.email','test@x.com'],{cwd}); execFileSync('git',['config','user.name','test'],{cwd}); seed 5 fixture pending .md files (decisions/foo.md, pitfalls/bar.md, guidelines/baz.md, models/qux.md, processes/quux.md) with valid frontmatter (no id, layer:team, type:<plural>, maturity:draft); execFileSync('git',['add','.'],{cwd}); execFileSync('git',['commit','-m','seed'],{cwd}); afterEach drains tmpDirs
Test list: call reviewKnowledge(projectRoot,{action:'list'}); assert items.length===5; assert each item has type, layer, maturity matching seeded values; assert pending_path is relative
Test list with filter: call with {action:'list', filters:{type:'decisions'}}; assert items.length===1

Test approve single: call with {action:'approve', pending_paths:[<path-of-decisions-foo>]}; assert response.approved.length===1; assert approved[0].stable_id matches /^KT-D-0001$/; assert pending file no longer exists; assert canonical .fabric/knowledge/team/decisions/KT-D-0001--foo.md exists; assert events.jsonl has knowledge_promote_started followed by knowledge_promoted; assert agents.meta.json counters[team][D]===1
Test approve batch: call with all 5 pending_paths; assert 5 distinct stable_ids per type code mapping; assert 10 events emitted (5 started + 5 promoted)
Test approve failure: chmod the canonical destination dir to 000 (POSIX-only; skipIf win32); call approve; assert event knowledge_promote_failed emitted; assert original file still in pending/
Test reject: approve a fixture first then call {action:'reject', pending_paths:[...], reason:'duplicate'}; assert knowledge_rejected event emitted; assert file still on disk (rc.3 retains)
Test modify in-place: approve a fixture then call {action:'modify', pending_path:<canonical>, changes:{maturity:'verified'}}; assert frontmatter updated; assert no layer_changed event emitted

Test modify layer flip: approve KT-D-0001--foo.md then call {action:'modify', pending_path:<canonical-team>, changes:{layer:'personal'}}; assert new file at .fabric/knowledge/personal/decisions/KP-D-0001--foo.md; assert old file gone; assert response.prior_stable_id===KT-D-0001 and new_stable_id===KP-D-0001; assert knowledge_layer_changed event with from_layer:team to_layer:personal
Test search: approve all 5; call {action:'search', query:'baz', filters:{type:'guidelines'}}; assert items contains the guidelines entry
Test defer: call {action:'defer', pending_paths:[...], until:'2026-06-01T00:00:00Z', reason:'wait for stakeholder'}; assert knowledge_deferred event emitted with until and reason
Update tool-contracts.test.ts: add fab_review entry to contracts map; run `pnpm test -u` to baseline; verify __snapshots__/ contains fab_review JSON shape

Implement integration/filesystem-edit-fallback.test.ts: createV2Project; mkdir .fabric/knowledge/team/decisions; cp fixture .md to .fabric/knowledge/team/decisions/KT-D-0099--manual-move.md; do NOT call fab_review approve; call runDoctorReport(projectRoot); assert report.fixable_errors contains issue with code=knowledge_promoted_synthesized_required, stable_id=KT-D-0099; call runDoctorFix(projectRoot); read events.jsonl; assert one knowledge_promoted event present with stable_id=KT-D-0099 and reason starts with '[synthesized]'
Verify all tests pass: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test`; commit as 'test(server): integration tests for fab_review + filesystem-edit fallback (rc.3 TASK-007)'

reference.pattern: Vitest integration test convention (createV2Project + git init + seed fixture + service-direct invocation + readEventLedger assertion)
reference.examples: Mirror plan-context.test.ts L154-168 event-emission assertion + scan-init.test.ts L202 idempotency style + tool-contracts.test.ts snapshot pattern

criteria: fab-review.test.ts contains test cases for all 6 actions; pnpm test reports all green
Each action's events.jsonl trail asserted explicitly (not just service return value)
Layer flip test confirms id reallocation: KT-D-0001 → KP-D-0001 with from_layer/to_layer events
tool-contracts.test.ts snapshot includes fab_review schema (zodToJsonSchema baseline)
filesystem-edit-fallback.test.ts confirms doctor synthesizes knowledge_promoted with [synthesized] reason prefix
All tests run under 5 seconds total (vitest serial in single worker)
0 flaky tests across 10 consecutive runs (verify locally before commit)

rationale.chosen_approach: Service-direct invocation + readEventLedger assertion (matches repo convention); real git in tmpdir (no mocking) for realistic exec coverage
alternatives_considered: Mock execFileSync to avoid git-init cost — rejected: real git mv catches integration bugs (e.g. cross-layer mkdir) that mocks miss
MCP-over-HTTP integration test — rejected: rc.3 ships service-level confidence; HTTP wrapping is identical to existing tools and covered by tool-contracts schema test
decision_factors: Real git provides higher-fidelity test of approve/layer-flip git mv
tool-contracts snapshot pattern catches schema drift cheaply
rationale.tradeoffs: git init in tmpdir adds ~50ms per test; offset by serial vitest run keeping total well under 5s

manual_checks: Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test integration/fab-review.test.ts -t approve` 10 times; expect all green
Run with `--coverage` and inspect json-summary.json; verify review.ts >=90%
success_metrics: filesystem-edit-fallback.test.ts: 2 test cases (detect + fix) all green
No win32-specific failures (chmod-based negative test uses skipIf)

risks.description: git init + commit in beforeEach is slow (~30-60ms per test) — total suite drift over time
risks.mitigation: Use a single beforeAll for the git fixture if independence allows; reset to baseline commit between tests via execFileSync('git','reset','--hard','HEAD')
risks.fallback: Profile if total >10s; switch to per-suite (not per-test) git init

risks.description: Windows CI lacks chmod 000 → cannot test approve failure path on win32
risks.fallback: Mock execFileSync to throw for that single test as fallback path
